title: yikart/AiToEarn
friendlyTitle: AiToEarn helps creators publish and manage content with AI
summary: AiToEarn is an open-source AI content-marketing agent platform for creating, publishing, engaging, and monetizing content across channels including TikTok, YouTube, X, Instagram, LinkedIn, Douyin, Xiaohongshu, and Bilibili.
friendlySummary: AiToEarn is an AI agent platform for making, posting, and managing content across many social platforms.
whyItMatters: Creators and small teams can study or self-host a practical multi-platform content workflow with scheduling, engagement automation, and AI-assisted creation. It is especially relevant for anyone building creator or social-commerce agents.
friendlyWhyItMatters: Creators can use it to learn how AI can help with content planning, posting, replies, and monetization.
howItsUseful: Creators and small teams can study or self-host a practical multi-platform content workflow with scheduling, engagement automation, and AI-assisted creation. It is especially relevant for anyone building creator or social-commerce agents.
friendlyHowItsUseful: Creators can use it to learn how AI can help with content planning, posting, replies, and monetization.
